$description: Status colors. `destructive` is live (aliases the semantic layer). success/warning/info are PROPOSED v2 additions — not consumed by any component yet; wire up in Phase 4+.

destructive.$description: Alias of the live semantic token.

success.$description: Design sign-off 2026-07-08: green-700 (green-600 on white was 3.30:1 < AA). Not consumed yet.

warning.$description: The warning FILL. Consumed by badge (as a 10% tint).

warning-foreground.$description: Text ON a solid warning fill.

warning-text.$description: Warning as TEXT (on a light/tinted surface). amber.500 is the fill colour and is far too light to read — 2.1:1 on white; amber.700 is 4.6:1. success and info need no such split: green.700 and blue.600 already pass as text.
